items.name: agent-context-protocol
items.description: The Agent Context Protocol (ACP) is a documentation and planning system that enables AI agents to understand, build, and maintain complex software projects through structured knowledge capture. It transforms implicit project knowledge into explicit, machine-readable documentation that persists across agent sessions.
